title: DNSMP S2 Modpack
description:
DNSMP is a small but vibrant SMP server dedicated on building a friendly and close-knit community of Minecraft fans

Modpack by LogangstaMC
body:
![DigNation S2 logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ce1d62209d4ecd6ca2f03345a0dfd09abaa00a.png)

Hello Fellow Minecrafter!

We are DigNation! A semi-vanilla SMP server focused on building a friendly and close-knit community of Minecraft fans. This is where you can download the server performance pack with all the essential mods for our server.

The DigNation SMP Pack includes the best optimization mods available, set up for the best performance possible. We've spent a lot of time researching and testing, so our pack often works better than other optimization packs. If it doesn’t, we quickly find out why and fix it.

Our pack is rather straightforward and easy to maintain. It doesn't include many extra features or visual changes by default. Feel free to add or remove any mods from your pack included in the drop-down below to make your game more enjoyable. However, please check with Server Admins or check the #allowed-client-mods channel via the Discord server beforehand to ensure that the mods you want to remove or add are eligible for compatiblity with our server.

<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMER‼️</summary>
  
Disclaimer:
This modpack is specifically curated for DigNation SMP and is not intended for use on any other server. It ensures that everyone can play together easily and fairly on our server. It’s perfect for creating a fun and cohesive community experience.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Modpack Installation</summary>

Installation:

Download the Modpack:

- On the Modrinth page, select the latest modpack version then click to download,  saving the pack file to your computer.

Open Prism Launcher:
  
- Make sure Prism Launcher is installed on your computer, if you dont have Prism Launcher click [Here](https://youtu.be/CA2fdUzChCo?si=gaHwgyf-4bgKl_ct) for a quick tutorial.

- Launch Prism Launcher and log in with your Minecraft account.

Install the Modpack:

- Locate the downloaded Modpack file on your computer.

- Drag and drop the Modpack file into Prism Launcher's modpack area.

Launch Minecraft:

- Select the installed Modpack in your Prism Launcher.

- Double click the downloaded Modpack instance to “Launch” Minecraft with the DigNation SMP Pack.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Modpack Compatibility</summary>

The DigNation SMP Modpack works with the latest version of Minecraft 1.21.X (JAVA only) and is regularly updated to include new mods when they are avaliable.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Join the Community</summary>

Join other players among the 'DigNation Collective, share your builds, and get help by joining our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/chTE24jRfZ). We can’t wait to see what you’ll create and explore!

</details>

<summary>APPLY to be apart of DNSMP S2 HERE</summary>
